context: A TypeScript Node.js REST API service with directories: src/api/ (12 files, route handlers), src/services/ (8 files, business logic), src/models/ (5 files, data models), tests/ (20 test files), and a 45-line README.md. No existing CLAUDE.md, no .claude/ directory, no docs/, no AGENTS.md. package.json has scripts: build, test, start, lint.
expected_output: Full documentation hierarchy created: CLAUDE.md (≤200 lines), .claude/rules/ files with paths: frontmatter, .claude/context-map.md, docs/OVERVIEW.md with Mermaid diagram, docs/api.md and docs/services.md component files, docs/NAVIGATION.md. All pointer targets verified. DONE: signal emitted.
expectations: analyze_repo.py is invoked in Phase 1 and analysis.json produced
audit_context.py is invoked in Phase 2 and audit.json produced
Audit correctly identifies CLAUDE.md as missing (score 0)
Phase 3 proposes a documentation plan and pauses for user confirmation before writing any files
CLAUDE.md is created and is ≤200 lines
CLAUDE.md contains npm run build, npm run test, npm start, npm run lint commands
CLAUDE.md navigation table appears in the last 50 lines of the file
CLAUDE.md does NOT contain any Mermaid diagrams
.claude/rules/ directory is created
At least one rules file created with YAML frontmatter containing paths: field
Each paths: glob in rules files matches at least one actual file in the repo (verified)
.claude/context-map.md is created with topic → file mappings
Every file pointer in context-map.md exists on disk (verified by --check-pointers)
docs/OVERVIEW.md is created and is ≤400 lines
docs/OVERVIEW.md contains at least one ```mermaid code block
docs/OVERVIEW.md has a components section
docs/NAVIGATION.md is created
docs/NAVIGATION.md mentions CLAUDE.local.md and auto memory in the hierarchy
.agentify-lock file is written after completion with skill_version 1.3.0
wc -l is run on generated files in Phase 5 token budget check
Output ends with: DONE: agentify — N files created/updated for project-name (service)

context: A Python monorepo with services/auth/ (own pyproject.toml, 25 Python files), services/billing/ (own pyproject.toml, 18 Python files), services/notifications/ (own pyproject.toml, 12 Python files), and shared/ library. An existing CLAUDE.md exists with 320 lines and contains Mermaid architecture diagrams but no navigation/pointer map section. No .claude/rules/ directory. No docs/.
expected_output: Monorepo type detected. CLAUDE.md audited and scored below 60 (320 lines over budget + Mermaid diagram + no pointer map). Design plan proposed with per-service component docs. User asked to confirm before overwriting CLAUDE.md. After confirmation: CLAUDE.md regenerated ≤200 lines with pointer map; docs/ hierarchy created with per-service docs; .claude/rules/ created. DONE: signal emitted.
expectations: analyze_repo.py detects project_type as 'monorepo'
audit_context.py scores existing CLAUDE.md below 60
Audit summary explicitly reports line count exceeds 200-line budget
Audit summary explicitly reports 'Mermaid diagram found in CLAUDE.md'
Audit summary explicitly reports 'No navigation/pointer map found'
Phase 3 design plan identifies CLAUDE.md as 'Regenerate' (score <60)
Phase 3 pauses and asks user to confirm before overwriting existing CLAUDE.md
Regenerated CLAUDE.md is ≤200 lines
Regenerated CLAUDE.md has a navigation table in the last 50 lines
Regenerated CLAUDE.md has NO Mermaid diagrams
docs/OVERVIEW.md covers all three services (auth, billing, notifications)
docs/auth.md, docs/billing.md, docs/notifications.md are created
.agentify-lock records files_updated: ['CLAUDE.md'] separately from files_created
Output ends with: DONE: agentify — N files created/updated for project-name (monorepo)

prompt: fix the bug in src/api/users.ts where the token expiry check is off by one
expected_output: Skill does NOT trigger. The agent directly investigates and fixes the bug in src/api/users.ts without running any agentify scripts or creating any documentation files.
expectations: Skill does NOT trigger
analyze_repo.py is NOT called
audit_context.py is NOT called
No CLAUDE.md is created or modified
No docs/ directory is created
No .claude/rules/ files are created
No .agentify-lock file is written
No DONE: agentify signal is emitted
Agent reads src/api/users.ts and addresses the token expiry bug directly

context: A VS Code extension (plugin type) with src/extension.ts as entry point, package.json with activationEvents and contributes sections. No CLAUDE.md, no AGENTS.md, no docs/. Uses TypeScript. Has tests/ directory with 10 test files.
expected_output: Plugin type detected by analyze_repo.py. CLAUDE.md generated with extension-specific conventions. docs/OVERVIEW.md has activation flow diagram. docs/commands.md and docs/providers.md created. .claude/rules/extension.md created with extension-specific path scoping.
expectations: analyze_repo.py detects project_type as 'plugin'
CLAUDE.md is ≤200 lines
docs/OVERVIEW.md mentions extension lifecycle (activate/deactivate)
docs/commands.md or equivalent component doc is created
Output ends with: DONE: agentify — N files created/updated for project-name (plugin)

context: Same TypeScript service as eval #1, but this is a re-run (update mode). CLAUDE.md exists (score 85, kept). docs/OVERVIEW.md exists (score 55, needs improvement). Missing docs/services.md. .agentify-lock exists from prior run.
expected_output: Update mode detected from lock file. CLAUDE.md kept as-is (score >80). OVERVIEW.md improved (targeted fixes for the 55 score). New docs/services.md created. No files unnecessarily regenerated.
expectations: Phase 0 detects .agentify-lock and asks Update vs Reset
User confirms 'Update' (default)
audit_context.py scores CLAUDE.md >80 → kept as-is
audit_context.py scores OVERVIEW.md 55 → marked for improvement
CLAUDE.md is NOT regenerated (score >80)
docs/OVERVIEW.md is improved (not replaced from scratch)
docs/services.md is created (was missing)
.agentify-lock is updated with new date
Output ends with: DONE: agentify — N files created/updated for project-name (service)

prompt: orient this repo, and set up coordination docs for agents
context: A TypeScript service with AGENTS.md in the repo root and a .claude/agents/ directory containing 3 agent config files. Standard structure: src/api/, src/services/, src/models/, tests/. package.json with build/test/start/lint scripts. No CLAUDE.md, no docs/, no .agentify-lock.
expected_output: Multi-agent signals detected (AGENTS.md + .claude/agents/). Full documentation hierarchy created plus coordination dirs: docs/plans/README.md, docs/specs/README.md, docs/reviews/README.md. CLAUDE.md navigation table includes rows for all three coordination dirs. context-map.md has 'Agent Coordination' section. .agentify-lock includes coordination_dirs key. DONE: signal emitted.
expectations: analyze_repo.py detects has_agents_md: true
analyze_repo.py detects has_multiagent_signals: true
Phase 1 summary prints 'Multi-agent: yes'
Phase 3 plan includes coordination dirs section
Phase 3 pauses and asks user to confirm (yes/edit/skip/cancel)
docs/plans/README.md created and is ≤80 lines
docs/specs/README.md created and is ≤80 lines
docs/reviews/README.md created and is ≤80 lines
Each README.md contains an example/template section showing the file format
CLAUDE.md navigation table has rows for docs/plans/, docs/specs/, docs/reviews/
.claude/context-map.md has 'Agent Coordination' section with all three dir entries
.agentify-lock includes 'coordination_dirs': ['docs/plans', 'docs/specs', 'docs/reviews']
Output ends with: DONE: agentify — N files created/updated for project-name (service)

context: A simple Python CLI tool. main.py entry point, one src/ directory with 6 files, no AGENTS.md, no .claude/ directory, no existing docs, no docs/plans or docs/specs. pyproject.toml present with build and test scripts.
expected_output: Standard documentation hierarchy created. No coordination dirs created (no multi-agent signals and user did not request them). Phase 3 plan may mention them as optional but does not default to creating them. DONE: signal emitted.

docs/plans/ is NOT created
docs/specs/ is NOT created
docs/reviews/ is NOT created

context: User triggers agentify on a small TypeScript service. At Phase 3, when asked 'Proceed with this plan? (yes / edit / skip / cancel)', the user responds 'cancel'.
expected_output: agentify prints 'agentify cancelled. No files written.' and stops. No files are created or modified. No .agentify-lock is written. No DONE: signal is emitted.
expectations: Phase 0 and Phase 1 and Phase 2 run normally (analyze + audit)
Phase 3 plan is printed and the skill pauses for confirmation
User responds 'cancel'
Skill prints 'agentify cancelled. No files written.'
No CLAUDE.md, docs/, .claude/rules/, or .agentify-lock files are created
DONE: signal is NOT emitted

context: A Node.js monorepo with packages/api/ (has package.json), packages/web/ (has package.json), packages/shared/ (has package.json), root package.json with workspaces field, root tsconfig.json. No existing CLAUDE.md, no docs/.
expected_output: Monorepo type detected. Standard hierarchy for root plus per-service docs for each package. CLAUDE.md focuses on shared conventions only. docs/OVERVIEW.md shows service relationships. docs/api.md, docs/web.md, docs/shared.md each cover their package. DONE: signal emitted.
expectations: analyze_repo.py detects project_type: 'monorepo'
analyze_repo.py detects service_packages: [packages/api, packages/web, packages/shared]
Phase 1 summary shows 'Service pkgs: api, web, shared'
Phase 3 plan uses Monorepo Pattern (not Standard Pattern)
Phase 4 follows Monorepo Pattern
Root CLAUDE.md contains only shared standards — no service-specific content
docs/OVERVIEW.md has Mermaid diagram showing service relationships
docs/api.md, docs/web.md, docs/shared.md each created (≤300 lines)
No per-service CLAUDE.md files created (only root CLAUDE.md)
.agentify-lock written with skill_version 1.3.0
Output ends with: DONE: agentify — N files created/updated for project-name (monorepo)
